name: dsmcp-default
description: Default full-design-system theme: color, typography, spacing, radius, elevation, motion. Ships 18 modes (PLAN §11.1 functional pack + §11.2 aesthetic pack), each inheriting a light/dark base via `extends` and overriding only what differs.

modes.name: dark
modes.description: Dark base — deep gray surfaces (not pure black)

modes.name: dim
modes.description: Softer dark — bluish-gray, gentler contrast (GitHub Dark Dimmed / X Dim)

modes.name: high-contrast-light
modes.description: A11y: maximal contrast on light (WCAG AAA target)

modes.name: sepia
modes.description: Warm cream surfaces — easy long-form reading (Kindle/reader)

modes.name: solarized-light
modes.description: Solarized light palette — popular among developers

modes.name: love
modes.description: Aesthetic: romantic / Valentine — blush pink with rose accent

modes.name: future
modes.description: Aesthetic: cyberpunk / sci-fi — neon cyan on near-black

modes.name: sakura
modes.description: Aesthetic: anime / kawaii — soft cherry-blossom pastel

modes.name: forest
modes.description: Aesthetic: nature — greens and earthy browns

modes.name: ocean
modes.description: Aesthetic: sea — deep blue and teal

modes.name: coffee
modes.description: Aesthetic: cozy mocha — warm browns and cream

modes.name: aurora
modes.description: Aesthetic: northern lights — night blue with emerald accent
